race.comment: SOUL MISTRESS (10) closed off strongly last start to get up for second, beaten a long neck, over 1600m at this track when coming back from a spell. Better for that and was knocking on the door of a win last time in. Go close. JENNI BASSETT (8) finished 5.5 lengths away in seventh last time out over 1400m at this track after being in contention on the bend two weeks ago. Draws well and should get a nice run, expect she improves here. MISS SHIINO (9) did her best work late to finish second when unwanted in betting at her latest appearance at this track over 1400m. Have to take seriously now, big chance. OSHIMA (3) debuted three weeks ago when he finished sixth over 1200m at this track, beaten 1.75 lengths. Will take a lot from that last run and is worth following up.
